scripts.setup:agent: git submodule update --init packages/agent packages/mineflayer-pathfinder packages/prismarine-viewer && pnpm install
scripts.setup:test-suite: git submodule update --init packages/mineflayer-test-suite packages/prismarine-viewer && pnpm install
scripts.build:watch: concurrently -n agent,viewer "pnpm --filter bedwars-agent build:watch" "pnpm --filter prismarine-viewer build:watch"
scripts.commit:agent: cd packages/agent && git add -A && git commit && cd ../.. && git add packages/agent && git commit -m 'chore: bump agent'
scripts.commit:pathfinder: cd packages/mineflayer-pathfinder && git add -A && git commit && cd ../.. && git add packages/mineflayer-pathfinder && git commit -m 'chore: bump mineflayer-pathfinder'
scripts.commit:test-suite: cd packages/mineflayer-test-suite && git add -A && git commit && cd ../.. && git add packages/mineflayer-test-suite && git commit -m 'chore: bump mineflayer-test-suite'
scripts.commit:viewer: cd packages/prismarine-viewer && git add -A && git commit && cd ../.. && git add packages/prismarine-viewer && git commit -m 'chore: bump prismarine-viewer'
